---
title: "psc_normalize"
generated: true
description: "Percent signal change: $100 (x -  mu) / ( mu +  epsilon)$."
---

[тА╣ back to `nitrix.numerics.normalize`](../nitrix-numerics-normalize.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:psc_normalize -->
```python
psc_normalize(x: Num[Array, '...'], *, axis: _AxisArg = -1, weights: Optional[Num[Array, '...']] = None, eps: float = 1e-12) -> Num[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:psc_normalize -->
Percent signal change: $100 (x - \mu) / (\mu + \epsilon)$.

The fMRI BOLD convention, where $\mu$ is the (optionally
weighted) mean along `axis`.  This is a per-cell
normalisation, interpretable as "deviation from baseline as a
percent of baseline".
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:psc_normalize -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `...` | тАФ | Input tensor. |
| `axis` | `_AxisArg` | тАФ | `-1` | Axis (or axes) over which the baseline mean is reduced. Default `-1` (the trailing observation axis). |
| `weights` | `Optional[Num[Array, '...']]` | тАФ | `None` | Optional non-negative weights broadcastable against `x`, used when computing the baseline mean. When `None`, the unweighted mean is used. |
| `eps` | `float` | тАФ | `1e-12` | Denominator stabiliser guarding a zero baseline mean. |

**Returns** `Num` тАФ shape `...`. Percent-signal-change tensor, same shape as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:psc_normalize -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks тАФ nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **164.3 ┬╡s** (median, L4); up to **120.64├Ч faster** than `numpy.psc`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_PSC_NORMALIZE.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=2048 | `cupy.psc_normalize` | skipped | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=2048 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.09 ms / 1.19 ms | 84.35 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | тЬУ 0.14├Чtol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=2048 | `numpy.psc` | ok | 8.37 ms / 14.21 ms | 26.12 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | тЬУ 0.15├Чtol | 7.69x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=2048 | `cupy.psc_normalize` | ok | 287.5 ┬╡s / 298.8 ┬╡s | 207.22 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.14├Чtol | 1.87x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=2048 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 153.7 ┬╡s / 164.3 ┬╡s | 292.55 ms | 50.35 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.13├Чtol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=2048 | `numpy.psc` | ok | 9.50 ms / 16.34 ms | 26.02 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.15├Чtol | 61.80x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `cupy.psc_normalize` | skipped | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 20.32 ms / 22.27 ms | 106.75 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | тЬУ 0.13├Чtol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `numpy.psc` | ok | 117.47 ms / 121.67 ms | 141.64 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | тЬУ 0.14├Чtol | 5.78x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `cupy.psc_normalize` | ok | 1.98 ms / 1.99 ms | 159.56 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.15├Чtol | 2.12x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 931.1 ┬╡s / 959.4 ┬╡s | 286.01 ms | 201.36 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.14├Чtol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `numpy.psc` | ok | 112.32 ms / 114.92 ms | 108.25 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.14├Чtol | 120.64x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=512 | `cupy.psc_normalize` | skipped | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ | тАФ |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 109.7 ┬╡s / 115.1 ┬╡s | 67.09 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | тЬУ 0.095├Чtol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cpu | n=512 | `numpy.psc` | ok | 247.9 ┬╡s / 282.5 ┬╡s | 392.8 ┬╡s | 1280 MB (rss) | тЬУ 0.13├Чtol | 2.26x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `cupy.psc_normalize` | ok | 105.3 ┬╡s / 112.7 ┬╡s | 161.34 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.13├Чtol | 1.10x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 95.5 ┬╡s / 97.0 ┬╡s | 256.63 ms | 34.61 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.095├Чtol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| psc_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `numpy.psc` | ok | 228.1 ┬╡s / 239.7 ┬╡s | 295.8 ┬╡s | 1.05 MB (hbm) | тЬУ 0.13├Чtol | 2.39x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `3ebfa0ef` ┬╖ nitrix `f42e7ff8`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:psc_normalize -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
